tagline: The All-In-One HELOC Proposal Tool for Loan Officers

tiers.name: Carbon
tiers.label: Starter
tiers.description: Everything you need to build and share professional HELOC proposals.

features.name: Core Quote Builder
features.description: Full rate matrix with 3 tiers (10, 15, 20, 30-year terms), real-time snapshot, client info fields, credit score, home value, and mortgage balance inputs.

features.name: PDF Export
features.description: Generate a clean, branded PDF of any proposal with one click.

features.name: Screenshot & Copy
features.description: Capture the proposal as a high-res image and copy it to clipboard for easy sharing.

features.name: LO Profile / Branding
features.description: Add your name, NMLS, company, headshot, and logo to every proposal. Your brand, your proposals.

features.name: Lead Parser
features.description: Paste raw lead data (from Bonzo, email, or any source) and auto-fill client fields instantly.

features.name: Bonzo Lead Import
features.description: Import leads directly from Bonzo CRM into the quote builder.

features.name: Email / Share
features.description: Copy a shareable link or email the proposal to your client with basic sharing tools.

features.name: Cloud Sync
features.description: Quotes auto-save to the cloud. Access your work from any device, never lose a proposal.

features.name: Saved Quotes
features.description: View, reload, and manage your saved quote history.

tiers.name: Titanium
tiers.label: Pro
tiers.description: Unlock powerful analysis tools and integrations that close more deals.

new_features.name: Debt Consolidation Analysis
new_features.description: Add client debts (credit cards, auto loans, etc.), calculate blended rates, and show net monthly savings when consolidating into a HELOC.

new_features.name: Refi Comparison
new_features.description: Side-by-side comparison of existing HELOC vs. new terms — old payment, new payment, monthly difference, 1-year, 5-year, and lifetime savings.

new_features.name: Break-Even Analysis
new_features.description: Calculate exactly when a client breaks even on upfront costs vs. monthly savings between rate tiers.

new_features.name: Client Apply Link
new_features.description: Add a branded 'Apply Now' button to your proposals with your custom application URL. Turn proposals into applications.

new_features.name: GHL Integration
new_features.description: Send proposals and client data directly to GoHighLevel CRM. Keep your pipeline updated automatically.

new_features.name: AI Strategy Assistant (Basic)
new_features.description: Generate an AI-powered strategy summary for any proposal — personalized talking points, objection handling, and follow-up suggestions.

new_features.name: Radar Address Autocomplete
new_features.description: Smart address autocomplete powered by Radar. Faster data entry, fewer errors.

tiers.name: Platinum
tiers.label: Business
tiers.description: Advanced automation, full CRM sync, and AI that works as hard as you do.

new_features.name: n8n Workflow Automation
new_features.description: Connect your HELOC tool to 400+ apps via n8n. Automate follow-ups, notifications, data sync, and custom workflows.

new_features.name: Bonzo / Follow Up Boss Full Sync
new_features.description: Two-way sync with Bonzo and Follow Up Boss CRMs. Contacts, quotes, and activity flow seamlessly between systems.

new_features.name: Outbound Webhooks
new_features.description: Push quote events (created, updated, sent) to any external URL. Build custom integrations with your existing tech stack.

new_features.name: Lender Info Parser
new_features.description: Paste raw lender rate sheets and auto-extract tier rates, fees, and terms. Update your rate matrix in seconds.

new_features.name: AI Strategy Assistant (Full)
new_features.description: Access all AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) with custom prompts. Fine-tune strategy output to match your selling style.

tiers.name: Obsidian
tiers.label: Enterprise
tiers.description: White-label the entire tool under your brand. Perfect for teams and brokerages.

new_features.name: White Label Branding
new_features.description: Remove all Carbon HELOC branding. Replace with your company name, colors, logo, and domain. Your clients never see our brand.

new_features.name: Company Settings
new_features.description: Manage company-wide defaults — rate matrices, disclaimer text, compliance language, and LO profile templates for your entire team.

tiers.name: Diamond
tiers.label: VIP
tiers.description: Everything unlocked, plus priority support and early access to new features.

new_features.name: Priority Support
new_features.description: Direct access to our team. Issues resolved within 24 hours, feature requests prioritized.

new_features.name: Early Access
new_features.description: Be the first to try new features before they roll out to other tiers.

new_features.name: All Future Features
new_features.description: Every new feature we build is automatically included in your plan. No upgrade surprises.

faq.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
faq.a: Yes. Changes take effect immediately. If you upgrade, you get instant access to new features. If you downgrade, you keep access until the end of your billing cycle.
Yes! Every plan comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

faq.q: Do I need my own API keys?
faq.a: For AI Strategy and some integrations, your admin can set API keys per user. No technical setup required on your end.

faq.q: Can I use this for my whole team?
faq.a: Yes! Obsidian and Diamond tiers include company-wide settings. Contact us for team pricing.
